name: venueflow
description: VenueFlow — Smart Venue Experience Platform powered by Google Cloud. Real-time crowd analytics, AI assistant (Gemini), and venue management for large-scale events.

scripts.test: echo "Run TestSuite.runAll() in browser console for client-side tests" && node -e "console.log('Server healthcheck...'); fetch('http://localhost:8080/healthz').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>console.log('OK:',d.status)).catch(()=>console.log('Server not running'))"
scripts.validate: npm run lint && echo 'All checks passed!'

author: VenueFlow Team
